params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitions
params.description: Comma-delimited list of definition IDs to filter by

params.name: queues
params.description: Comma-delimited list of queue IDs to filter by

params.name: buildNumber
params.description: Filter by build number. Append asterisk for prefix matching.

params.name: minTime
params.description: Filter to builds after this date based on the query order

params.name: maxTime
params.description: Filter to builds before this date based on the query order

params.name: requestedFor
params.description: Filter to builds requested by this user

params.name: reasonFilter
params.description: Filter by the reason the build was created

params.name: statusFilter
params.description: Filter by current build status

params.name: resultFilter
params.description: Filter by build result

params.name: tagFilters
params.description: Comma-delimited list of tags to filter by

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of builds to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: maxBuildsPerDefinition
params.description: Maximum number of builds to return per definition

params.name: deletedFilter
params.description: Filter for deleted builds

params.name: queryOrder
params.description: Sort order for the results

params.name: branchName
params.description: Filter to builds from this branch

params.name: buildIds
params.description: Comma-delimited list of build IDs to retrieve

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: Filter to builds from this repository

params.name: repositoryType
params.description: Filter to builds from repositories of this type

items.docs: Returns a list of builds matching the specified filter criteria. Supports filtering by definition, status, result, branch, repository, time range, and tags. Results are paginated and can be ordered by queue time, start time, or finish time.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific build including its status, result, definition, source branch, timing, and the identity that queued it.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Updates properties of a completed or in-progress build such as the keep-forever flag, build number, or retention status.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Deletes a build by moving it to the recycle bin. Deleted builds can be restored within the retention period.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Returns all artifacts published by a build. Artifacts can include compiled binaries, test results, packages, or any files published using the PublishBuildArtifacts or PublishPipelineArtifact task.

info.name: Azure Pipelines Get a specific build artifact

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

params.name: artifactName
params.description: Name of the artifact to retrieve

items.docs: Returns a specific named artifact from a build including its download URL and file container reference.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

items.docs: Returns the list of tags associated with a build.

info.name: Azure Pipelines Add a tag to a build

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

params.name: tag
params.description: Tag to add to the build

items.docs: Adds a tag to a build. Tags are used for categorization, filtering, and retention policy purposes.

info.name: Azure Pipelines Remove a tag from a build

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: buildId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build

params.name: tag
params.description: Tag to remove from the build

items.docs: Removes a tag from a build.

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: name
params.description: Filter by definition name (supports prefix match with asterisk)

params.name: repositoryId
params.description: Filter to definitions using this repository

params.name: repositoryType
params.description: Filter by repository type

params.name: queryOrder
params.description: Sort order for results

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of definitions to return

params.name: continuationToken
params.description: Continuation token for paginated results

params.name: path
params.description: Filter by folder path

params.name: builtAfter
params.description: Filter to definitions with builds after this date

params.name: notBuiltAfter
params.description: Filter to definitions without builds after this date

params.name: includeAllProperties
params.description: Include all properties of the definition

params.name: includeLatestBuilds
params.description: Include the latest build for each definition

items.docs: Returns a list of build definitions in the project. Build definitions define how builds are executed including source repository, triggers, variables, and agent pool configuration.

info.name: Azure Pipelines Get a build definition

params.name: api-version
params.description: Azure DevOps REST API version. Use 7.1 for the latest stable version.

params.name: definitionId
params.description: Numeric ID of the build definition

params.name: revision
params.description: Specific revision of the definition to retrieve

params.name: includeLatestBuilds
params.description: Include the latest build for the definition

items.docs: Returns detailed information about a specific build definition including its triggers, variables, repository configuration, process steps, and agent pool settings.
